achievements_story.title: QR Restaurant SaaS
achievements_story.story:
Project Description
This is a multi-tenant SaaS platform designed for restaurants to manage QR-based ordering. It functions as a complete system where:

For Restaurants (Admins & Kitchen Implementation): Each restaurant is fully isolated (like an Instagram account) and can manage its own menu, track orders in real-time, and handle kitchen workflows (paid → preparing → ready).
For Customers: Guests can scan a QR code to browse the menu and place orders directly from their phones without needing to create an account.
Tech Stack: The project uses Vite + React for the frontend and Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + RLS) for the backend, relying on Row Level Security (RLS) to ensure data isolation between different restaurants.
The current version (MVP) includes features for authentication, menu management (with CSV import), QR code generation, a cart/ordering system, and a kitchen display system.
